faq.title: Popular Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before connecting with verified experts.
faq.cta: Still have questions? Start chatting with an expert now.
faq.q1: Can I talk to a verified expert instantly?
faq.a1: Yes. You can choose chat or call and connect with available verified experts in just a few taps.
faq.q2: How does per-minute chat or call consultation work?
faq.a2: Your wallet is charged based on the expert's per-minute rate while the consultation is active.
faq.q3: Can I choose an expert by category?
faq.a3: Yes. Browse categories like legal, health, career, astrology, finance, business, and more.
faq.q4: Is my chat with the expert private and secure?
faq.a4: Consultations are designed for private one-to-one guidance between you and the selected expert.
faq.q5: How do I recharge my wallet before consultation?
faq.a5: Open your wallet, add balance, and start a chat or call once your balance is ready.
faq.q6: Can I get career, legal, health, astrology, or business advice?
faq.a6: Yes. G9 Experts supports multiple professional categories for instant guidance.
faq.q7: How are experts verified on G9 Experts?
faq.a7: Expert profiles include trust signals, category details, and review information to help users decide.
faq.q8: Can I see expert ratings and reviews before connecting?
faq.a8: Yes. Ratings, reviews, and profile details help you compare experts before starting.
faq.q9: What happens if my wallet balance is low?
faq.a9: You can recharge your wallet before or during the consultation flow to continue smoothly.
faq.q10: Can I follow an expert for future consultation?
faq.a10: Yes. Following an expert makes it easier to find them again for future guidance.
